overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a medieval European town. The character walks along wooden walkways and cobblestone streets through narrow passages between stone and half-timbered buildings, eventually emerging into an open town square with a central well.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated wooden walkway attached to a stone merchant building. A worker is visible on the left working with goods, while a large wooden crane structure stands ahead against a backdrop of clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone passage between historic stone buildings

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the wooden walkway onto cobblestone ground, passing through a narrow stone passage. Large arched doorways and wooden scaffolding line the path as the space remains enclosed between tall stone structures.

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a narrow cobblestone street lined with half-timbered houses. A woman kneels working near a wooden fence on the right, while sacks of goods sit under a wooden awning on the left. A stone archway looms ahead connecting the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with central stone well

events.description: emerges from narrow street into open town square with central well and scattered townspeople

entered.detail: circular stone well with wooden roof structure in the center of the square
wide open cobblestone plaza surrounded by historic buildings on all sides

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow street, the scene opens into a sunlit town square with a prominent stone well at its center. Several townspeople gather around the well while half-timbered buildings surround the open cobblestone plaza. The character continues forward into the spacious central area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated merchant's walkway through narrow urban corridors and into a wide, sunlit town square. It begins on a wooden platform attached to a stone building, passing a worker and a large wooden crane set against a clear blue sky. As the character descends from the walkway, the environment shifts into a confined stone passage lined with arched doorways and wooden scaffolding. The scene then transitions into a narrow cobblestone street flanked by half-timbered houses and sacks of goods before passing under a looming stone archway. Finally, the enclosed path opens up into a spacious central plaza where townspeople gather around a prominent stone well under the bright sun.
